news.headline: HopSkipDrive introduces 4 safety initiatives to improve student transpo. 99.7% rides in 2024 completed without issues.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, HopSkipDrive, a tech company addressing transportation challenges with a focus on safety and care, unveiled four safety initiatives to strengthen their dedication to safe student transportation. Their sixth annual Safety Report revealed that 99.7% of rides in 2024 were incident-free. As part of the new measures, HopSkipDrive aims to enhance safety protocols and further ensure reliable transportation for students.

Bassett Furniture declares $0.20 dividend/share for Q2 2025, payable on May 30 to shareholders of record on May 16.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Bassett Furniture Industries, Inc. (Nasdaq: BSET) revealed a quarterly dividend of $0.20 per common stock share. The dividend is set to be paid on May 30, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of May 16, 2025.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls due to Trump's tariff threats; Nvidia and Tesla stocks drop. Market reacts negatively.
news.summary: On Thursday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a decline due to President Donald Trump's announcement of potential new tariffs. This resulted in a sell-off of Nvidia and Tesla stocks in the market today. The drop in the Dow Jones was significant in response to the tariff threats, impacting various sectors. These events reflect the uncertainty and volatility in the market as investors navigate the implications of the escalating trade tensions.

news.headline: Quantum computing advances with Aurora, a new quantum computer unveiled by scientists. Big leap for investors.
news.summary: Released by Scope Technologies Corp. for USA News Group, the latest revelation on March 13, 2025, discusses the rapid advancement towards a quantum computing era. Scientists recently introduced Aurora, a cutting-edge quantum computer that marks a significant milestone in this progression. This development signifies the acceleration towards achieving practical applications of quantum computing technology.

news.headline: Indian company leader Sanjay Shah gifts $3.9 million in shares (INR 34 crore) to employees and personal staff as a token of gratitude.
news.summary: Sanjay Shah, the Chairman and Managing Director of Prudent Corporate Advisory Services, demonstrated a remarkable act of gratitude by gifting shares worth INR 34 crore (approximately $3.9 million) to the employees and personal staff. This generous gesture took place in Ahmedabad, India on March 13, 2025. The recipients were deeply touched by this unusual and heartwarming action from Mr. Shah, showing appreciation for their hard work and dedication.

news.headline: Oracle Corporation improves financial crime probes with AI in Investigation Hub Cloud Service, reducing manual effort and aiding global institutions.
news.summary: Oracle Corporation (NYSE:ORCL) announced on Wednesday that its Oracle Financial Services division is boosting its Investigation Hub Cloud Service with AI agents and agentic workflows to automate financial crime investigations.The enhanced service offers AI agents that identify crucial information, collect evidence, suggest actions, and create thorough alert reports, all while minimizing the need for manual labor.These functionalities assist financial organizations of varying sizes in simplifying crime and case handling processes and are accessible worldwide.Jason Somrak, who leads financial crime product strategy at Oracle, highlighted the benefits of these new capabilities.

news.headline: Nasdaq drops over 100 points; US producer inflation stalls in February. Dow -0.18% at 41,276.26, NASDAQ -0.71% at 17,523.60, S&P 500 -0.33% at 5,580.80.
news.summary: This morning, U.S. stocks experienced a decline, with the Nasdaq Composite dropping over 100 points. At market opening on Thursday, the Dow decreased by 0.18% to 41,276.26, the NASDAQ fell by 0.71% to 17,523.60, and the S&P 500 dropped by 0.33% to 5,580.80. Energy shares saw a 0.9% increase, while consumer discretionary shares dipped by 1.8%. In top news, U.S. producer prices remained stagnant in February, with core inflation showing a rare decrease, indicating a potential easing of cost pressures despite ongoing trade tariff concerns. The month saw U.S. producer prices unchanged from the previous month, following a 0.6% rise in January. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Tune in to UNDER EXPOSED EP16 for insight into Bitcoin's ecosystem challenges. Stream live every Tuesday, 12:00-1:00 PM EST on YouTube and X.
news.summary: UNDER EXPOSED provides in-depth coverage of major news affecting the cryptocurrency and broader markets on a weekly basis. The show, hosted by TylerD, Deeze, Geebz, and Peter Jennings, delves into the latest trends, trades, and narratives in the industry. Tune in to hear detailed discussions on the most notable sectors in crypto and NFTs, market movers, and the hosts' current investment strategies. The show streams live every Tuesday from 12:00 PM EST to 1:00 PM EST on YouTube and X.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Telus International investors from Feb 16, 2023 to Aug 1, 2024. Contact for losses.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who incurred losses in Telus International to reach out to him directly to explore their alternatives. If you bought securities in Telus International within the period of February 16, 2023, to August 1, 2024, and experienced financial setbacks, Wilson advises contacting him for further assistance.

news.headline: Oracle is a leading contender to help run Tiktok in new deal - The Information. $ORCL
Hospi Corp & BetterRX collaborate to aid hospices with quick symptom relief, reduce costs by 37%.
news.summary: A newly established medical device company in San Mateo, California, and a pharmacy technology company have revealed a partnership aimed at assisting hospice patients. The collaboration, announced on March 13, 2025, involves Hospi Corporation, the manufacturer of the Macy Catheter, and BetterRX. The joint efforts between the two companies intend to provide support to hospices and enhance the care of patients in need.

Trump: Canada needs America, America does not need Canada.
States file lawsuit against Trump over Education Dept 'dismantling', citing irreparable harm.
Mexico's Economy Minister: Mexico believes steel, aluminium tariffs are a bad idea.
Mexico's Economy Minister: Mexico is preparing to use any tools necessary for tariffs.
Ballard Power's Q4 revenue drops by 48% to $24.5 million, missed estimates; order backlog grows, shares rise.
news.summary: Ballard Power Systems Inc, listed as BLDP on NASDAQ, saw its shares rise following the release of its fourth-quarter financial results. The company reported a 48% decrease in revenue compared to the previous year, totaling $24.5 million, which fell short of the analyst consensus of $30.4 million. Revenue from heavy-duty mobility dropped by 42% year-over-year to $16.8 million, attributed to lower earnings from truck, rail, and marine sectors, while Stationary revenue fell by 46%. The gross margin showed improvement, increasing by 9 basis points to (13%) due to decreased impairment adjustments and warranty obligation expirations. Operating expenses for the quarter were $33.1 million, a 5% decrease from the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA loss was reported at $36.0 million, compared to the previous year's loss of $44.1 million.

news.headline: Mexico Economy Minister: Tariffs on steel and aluminium a bad idea, we can take other measures.
Vaco named one of the 2025 Best Staffing Firms in North America for 7th year. NASHVILLE, March 13, 2025.
news.summary: Vaco has been recognized as a top player in the staffing industry for the seventh year in a row. The firm, headquartered in Nashville, Tennessee, received this honor on March 13, 2025. Vaco offers a range of talent solutions including contract staffing, managed services, and direct-hire staffing. Their consistent performance has earned them a spot on the 2025 Best Staffing list, reinforcing their reputation as a trusted leader in the industry.

news.headline: Investors urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP if suffered losses exceeding $50,000 in ModivCare.
news.summary: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have experienced losses surpassing $50,000 in ModivCare during the period from November 3, 2022, to May 3, 2023, to reach out to him promptly for a discussion on their available options.

news.headline: DOGE layoffs not impacting jobless claims; S&P 500 slips. Shutdown concerns arise.
news.summary: Despite recent layoffs at DOGE, there has been no noticeable impact on initial claims for unemployment benefits. The number of individuals applying for unemployment remains stable despite the company's workforce reduction. Additionally, concerns about a potential shutdown are on the horizon, causing the S&P 500 to experience a slight decline. This information was shared in a live coverage update from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Ulta Beauty Q4 earnings preview: watch for changing consumer behaviors. Potential decrease in gross margins.
news.summary: Ulta Beauty Inc. (NASDAQ: ULTA) will announce its Q4 financial results after Thursday's market close. The company is anticipating challenges due to evolving consumer habits, leading to a shift towards value-driven shopping and reduced discretionary spending. Ulta warned about a potential drop in gross margins in its previous earnings call. The impact of changing consumer behavior on Ulta's performance will be a key aspect to monitor in the upcoming report.

news.headline: BostonGene wins Fierce Life Sciences AI Innovation Award for molecular solutions in pathology, driving industry transformation.
news.summary: In Waltham, Massachusetts, BostonGene, a top provider of AI-driven molecular and immune profiling solutions, has been recognized as a winner of the Fierce Life Sciences Innovation Awards in the AI innovation category. This prestigious award, presented by Fierce Biotech and Fierce Pharma, highlights exceptional solutions making advancements in the industry. BostonGene's groundbreaking innovation focuses on addressing key challenges in pathology. This recognition underscores the company's commitment to transforming healthcare through cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: UK ONS will publish January trade data on March 28, citing identification of error in trade data.
UK ONS: We will delay January trade data which had been scheduled for March 14.
AI and ray tracing power NVIDIA's RTX Remix, rejuvenating classic games with enhanced graphics for modders. #GameChanger
news.summary: In a recent announcement, NVIDIA introduced RTX Remix, a cutting-edge platform that harnesses the power of AI and ray tracing to revitalize traditional games. This innovative offering provides modders with robust tools to improve graphics and overall gameplay experiences. The platform aims to enhance classic games by integrating advanced technologies, with a focus on realism and immersion.

Elysium Health™ introduces COFACTOR™: 4-in-1 Collagen System with NAD+ Boost, targets aging causes effectively.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Elysium Health, Inc.™ unveiled a groundbreaking product designed to boost collagen production by targeting various factors contributing to aging and collagen reduction. This is the sole product tailored to address these root causes. Elysium Health, Inc.™ is a prominent life sciences enterprise specializing in aging studies.

Seekapa introduces iOS & Android trading app for efficient trading on-the-go, offering flexibility and speed to traders.
news.summary: In Eden Island, Seychelles on March 13, 2025, it was reported that trading has advanced significantly from traditional desktop platforms. Modern traders require flexibility, speed, and efficiency to remain competitive in rapidly changing markets. The need for a reliable mobile trading platform is critical as opportunities emerge constantly. This shift reflects the demand for accessibility and convenience, with traders seeking real-time market updates and swift execution of trades.

news.headline: Immorta Bio presents SenoVax™ tumor remission data at biotech conference; Updates oncology program at LSX Investival Showcase.
news.summary: At the LSX Investival Showcase in Miami on March 13, 2025, Immorta Bio Inc., a scientific longevity company specializing in the treatment of diseases related to aging and addressing aging as a disease, shared updates on its oncology program. The company's Chairman disclosed important details about the progress in research and development, with key insights presented to an audience at the event. The focus was on advancing innovative approaches to combat various forms of cancer through cutting-edge technologies. Immorta Bio Inc.'s commitment to revolutionize healthcare for aging populations was evident in their latest report.

news.headline: APTURA Group appoints Karen Clark as President and Todd Bowman as CRO; transition effective May 30, 2025.
news.summary: In a press release dated March 13, 2025, APTURA Group, Inc., a company entirely owned by its employees, specializing in developing solutions for safe and secure building environments, revealed that Karen Clark will assume the role of President starting on May 30, 2025. This appointment marks a significant change in leadership for the company.

news.headline: Mobile Health appoints Kenneth Faltischek as CEO, Todd Wolf transitions to strategic board advisor. Expanding services nationwide.
news.summary: In New York today, Mobile Health, a prominent provider of nationwide occupational health, wellness, and compliance services, has named Kenneth Faltischek as its new CEO. Faltischek, a seasoned healthcare executive and a trusted advisor to Mobile Health, will guide the company through its upcoming phase of advancement and growth. The current CEO, Todd Wolf, will shift to the position of strategic board advisor to concentrate on significant growth efforts.

news.headline: Blade Air Mobility exceeds Q4 revenue expectations with $54.357 million, up 14.5% YoY, led by Passenger and Medical segments. High growth in Urban Air Mobility seen with New York City airport transfer service.
news.summary: Blade Air Mobility Inc. (NASDAQ:BLDE) saw an uptick in shares following a positive report on their fourth-quarter 2024 performance. The company disclosed a revenue increase of 14.5% year-over-year, reaching $54.357 million for the quarter, surpassing the estimated $51.13 million. The growth was primarily attributed to the Passenger and Medical segments, with revenue excluding Canada, which was exited in August 2024, showing a substantial 22.1% yearly increase. Notably, the company emphasized a strategic focus on enhancing growth in Urban Air Mobility endeavors, notably through offerings like the New York City airport transfer service, which experienced significant revenue expansion in Q4. The company aims to drive cost efficiencies in the Passenger business while simultaneously pushing forward with plans to transition from helicopters to eVTOL, with services like Blade Airport playing a crucial role in this progression. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Adobe Stock is down after reporting Q1 revenue at $5.71 billion vs. $5.66B estimates. Q1 EPS: $5.08 vs. $4.97 estimates. Total revenue up 10% YoY. Remaining performance obligations at $19.69B.
news.summary: Adobe Inc (NASDAQ:ADBE) saw a decline in share value after revealing Q1 results with weaker guidance. Q1 revenue was $5.71 billion, surpassing estimates of $5.66 billion. Q1 EPS stood at $5.08, higher than estimates of $4.97. Total revenue increased by 10% YoY, with digital media revenue up by 11% YoY and digital experience revenue by 10% YoY. Remaining performance obligations reached $19.69 billion by the end of the quarter. Analysts reduced price targets post-release. The company emphasizes future success through customer-centric innovation and new creator offerings.

news.headline: Bitcoin miners had a strong quarter with record profits. IREN saw a 65% production increase, mining 1,347 BTC. MARA led in coins mined with 2,514 BTC. JPMorgan analyst upgraded IREN to Overweight and moved Cipher Mining to Neutral.
news.summary: Bitcoin miners experienced one of the most successful quarters in history, with four out of five major publicly traded mining companies reporting record revenues and profits. These companies include Cipher Mining Inc, CleanSpark Inc, IREN Ltd, MARA Holdings Inc, and Riot Platforms Inc. The surge in Bitcoin's price played a significant role in this success. MARA led in total coins mined with 2,514 BTC, while IREN stood out with a 65% increase in production compared to the previous quarter, resulting in 1,347 BTC. JPMorgan analyst Reginald L. Smith highlighted the importance of cost management in the mining sector and upgraded IREN to Overweight while shifting Cipher Mining Inc to Neutral. This information was detailed in a comprehensive analysis available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Despite Trump's pro-crypto stance, Bitcoin's performance remains worse than in his first term, gaining only 50% in his first 100 days.
news.summary: Despite President Donald Trump's strong support for cryptocurrency, particularly Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), the digital currency has not seen significant improvements in performance during the initial hundred days of his second term as compared to the same period in his first term. Trump has been actively endorsing cryptocurrency, even introducing his own crypto venture and issuing an executive order for a strategic Bitcoin reserve. Nonetheless, both the traditional financial markets and the cryptocurrency markets have not met expectations, with Bitcoin failing to replicate the impressive 50% surge it experienced during the first 100 days of Trump's initial term. More detailed information can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Global WDM market valued at $5.3B in 2024, projected to reach $9.7B by 2034 with a 6.4% CAGR, driven by 5G expansion and AI in optical networks.
news.summary: Allied Market Research published a report on the Wavelength Division Multiplexer (WDM) Market, stating it was valued at $5.3 billion in 2024 and projected to reach $9.7 billion by 2034, with a growth rate of 6.4% from 2025 to 2034. The market is driven by the expansion of 5G networks, government investments in optical fiber infrastructure, and the adoption of AI and automation in optical networks. Despite growth potential, high initial investment costs could hinder market expansion. The report comprises 109 tables, 79 charts, and 256 pages, covering the period from 2025 to 2034.

news.headline: H.I.G. Capital invests in 360 Destination Group and CSI DMC with $67 billion.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, H.I.G. Capital, a prominent global alternative investment firm managing $67 billion in capital, reported a successful strategic investment by one of its affiliates in 360 Destination Group ("360DG") and CSI.

news.headline: Survey: 3D Cloud study finds 3D configurators boost efficiency, loyalty, sales for contract interior designers.
news.summary: In a recent survey conducted by Provoke Insights and 3D Cloud in 2025, it was found that contract interior designers are experiencing significant benefits from utilizing 3D configurators. The survey, which included professionals in commercial design, revealed a notable increase in efficiency, loyalty, and sales as a result of incorporating 3D configuration tools into their workflow. This trend was particularly evident in ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. The survey results indicate a growing acceptance and adoption of 3D technology in the industry, with a notable impact on the overall performance and success of contract interior designers.

news.headline: Co-Diagnostics, Inc. (NASDAQ: CODX) to release Q4 and full year 2024 earnings on March 13, 2025.
news.summary: Salt Lake City, March 13, 2025 - Co-Diagnostics, Inc., a molecular diagnostics company listed on NASDAQ with the ticker symbol CODX, unveiled plans to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company, known for its innovative patented platform for molecular diagnostic tests, is set to reveal key figures and insights in an upcoming announcement.

news.headline: Wybot unveils new pool cleaning lineup for summer; savings up to $400; includes S2 Solar, C2 Vision robotic cleaners.
news.summary: Groundbreaking pool cleaning technology is changing the game with the introduction of WYBOT S2 Solar Robotic Pool Cleaner, WYBOT C2 Vision Robotic Pool Cleaner, WYBOT F1 Robotic Pool Skimmer, and other innovative products. Based in ARCADIA, Calif., as of March 13, 2025, WYBOT is at the forefront of this revolution.

news.headline: Kandao Meeting Ultra gets full Zoom certification, ideal for small to medium rooms (2-18 people).
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on March 13, 2025, Kandao revealed that their Kandao Meeting Ultra has obtained official certification from Zoom, guaranteeing smooth integration with Zoom Rooms. Tailored for small to medium-sized rooms accommodating 2-18 individuals, this all-in-one video conferencing system offers impeccable compatibility with Zoom.

news.headline: SS&C GlobeOp Hedge Fund Performance Index down 1.02% in February, Capital Movement Index up 0.63% in March.
news.summary: SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SSNC) reported the latest hedge fund performance data. In February, the SS&C GlobeOp Hedge Fund Performance Index showed a decline of 1.02%. On the other hand, the SS&C GlobeOp Capital Movement Index indicated a positive trend in March with net flows increasing by 0.63%. This update was disclosed on March 13, 2025, in Windsor, Connecticut. The company continues to monitor and analyze the financial markets for investors.

news.headline: Board members, executives, and related individuals trading shares in Rovsing A/S, affecting company stock.
Medigene files patent for unique NK-specific TCR construct with European Patent Office, expanding its TCR-guided strategy.
news.summary: Medigene AG (FSE: MDG1, Prime Standard), a company specializing in oncology, has submitted a patent application for a new natural killer (NK) cell-specific T cell receptor (TCR) construct to the European Patent Office. This move signals Medigene's dedication to advancing its TCR-guided approach in cancer treatment by integrating its 3S (sensitive, specific, and safe) TCR technology into NK cells. The submission of this patent application not only extends Medigene's intellectual property portfolio but also strengthens its commitment to developing innovative immunotherapies for cancer treatment.
